reviews.review_description:
Best game I've played in a long while. When I play this i fell like I am doing something useful instead of nothing. It is amazing how its free and educational but you dont feel like your learning so you can play this after school and still feel fine.
Absolutely love it 100/10stars
When I open the game, it stays black. I don't know if this is normal or a glitch.

reviews.review_title: A Playful Introduction to the Elements
reviews.review_description:
Loving my first goes on this. The way you link elements to daily objects is really accessible, and the playful 'gamifying' definitely works. Hope you guys continue to add to it! (I'm sure you will, it's clearly got lots of potential :))

(Would be cool to have a quick text summary on the element pages. Especially for younger students it could help as a breadcrumb trail to solve some of the mini-challenges? Say Carbon could mention its presence in living organisms, helping them realise they could prime the device to makes apples / acorns etc by starting with C, to narrow down the build list). 

Great work :)

EDIT - Some handy tips for others:

- You can actually turn the music down with the Stereo on the wall :)
- If your cloud 'mission givers' glitch out and disappear just use the 'time travel' booth behind you to load/start another save, then return to your current one. They'll be back,

reviews.review_title: I like it alot but there's some problems
reviews.review_description: I've almost beaten the game ove collected all the elements and I just need to get all their versions by adding and subtracting isotopes but when I play for a while the in game menu starts to break and when I hover over it after 2 seconds my pointer goes right though it so every time I go to use it I have to go to a different page then back to that one over and over again

This is one of my favorites apps. I love to learn. I wish this had more feedback options as well. I completed everything! But there’s accomplishments you could add and a better way to delete elements. Absolutely wonderful. I remember so many elements now and where they belong, why they act and react how they do in some ways, and much more. Please keep paying attention to this game!
A good game and one of my favorite but raidioactive elements are kinda hard to store.

I love this game, ive spend literal hours and hours on it, the only complaints i have is about the ear grating music, the loud, repetitive keyboard presses give me a headache after a short amount of time playing, i hate to play on mute, because there are other sounds. Please please please add a settings, and let me mute the music, that is genuinely all i ask. Amazing game.

developer_response.body: Hi! Sorry about the repetitive music! You can mute the music (without muting the sound effects) by repeatedly pressing the "lower music volume" button on the Stereo which starts in the lab. If you no longer have a Stereo in the lab, you can craft a new Stereo from scratch! :)

reviews.review_description: Excellent game but please give it some attention and bring it out if early access or at least add more content while it’s early access ….. we love it

reviews.review_title: Really impressed so far; game 2weeks old
reviews.review_description: Neutron doping??... Sign me up twice! I have the official IAEA TRACE app on my mobile, so this game is perfect for weirdos like me.
Just please add more crafts and mutated things but still a goated game

It’s really fun the animations are amazing the mechanics too. I’d like the steering to be a bit backwards I set my boundary forwards then move backwards but that’s my personal preference. I’m excited to see where this game goes further
Bad
The way that you can create stuff find elements and create life out of objects is soo cool!!

reviews.review_title: This game brings the fun out in science

reviews.review_description: Please make a element backpack so you can organize the elements into a bag rather than a bunch on the floor

reviews.review_title: Fun but has a few problems
reviews.review_description: It is a really fun game when it works well, but as another person said this game is almost all about managing your workspace. Whenever I spend 15 minutes just on organizing the traders disappear and won’t come back in that world. Fixing this bug and adding features to help keep organized like a chest would be great and make the game a lot better.
With radioactive elements you should be able to store them in the containors on the right side of the room to stop them decaying
There’s no way to story elements, so you end up with a ton of random element cubes everywhere. It also could make it easier to be able to get new elements.

The only thing that's slightly annoying is there's not a way to move around the lab if there was It would be flawless the reason I want this is because its hard to move around the table. And being able to take stuff from another time lines if you take smth from a timeline and reset it that thing you took wont be there.

reviews.review_title: Great game but mutantic too much
reviews.review_description: I played the game and i get scared every time I see mutant developers please do the mutant not scary and very cute

Absolutely amazing game, from the concept to the execution it is all around perfect and I love it. It is extremely fleshed out with the periodic table and even light patterns! Love it so much! I only have 2 problems with it: firstly, the actual mechanics of the game are hard to understand at first, so I would love a tutorial teaching it and not just the controls. Secondly, the scenery and the music does get old pretty quickly. Apart from these two issues, I absolutely love it!

reviews.review_title: The fat guys were not spawning
reviews.review_description:
When I was playing I thought it was so cool but when I got off for the night I went to bed and got on the next morning and the day purple guys that you would trade stuff with were gone and I played for a few hours but they never spawned 


Love the game and hope this can get fixed 
Love Olsen

developer_response.body: Hey Olsen! Glad you're having fun! :D Yep, that is unfortunately a known bug. To work around it, simply visit another timeline using the "Teleporter booth" that's in the back of the lab, and then return to your main timeline! The purple guys will start spawning again shortly after! :) Sorry for the hassle! Edit: the bug is fixed now! Have fun!

reviews.review_description: why is it not letting me grab anything like i can't create anything

reviews.review_title: Great Game! Just a few critiques
reviews.review_description:
My friend got me into this game, since then, I’ve been playing it almost daily. I only have a few requests, 

1. Can we have a place for the nuclear elements? I can only place them on the crafting center and the tool on my left.

2. Can the customers arrive sooner? I like crafting, and I like to do it for fun, but I get  a bit impatient while I wait for the costumers 

3. Can we use the items we craft? This one is just because I found out there was a lightsaber 😅

These are my only critiques , all in all, it’s a really  fun game!

developer_response.body: Haha yea it's a real shame we never got around to making the craftables work (e.g. such as the lightsaber, or the matches). Thank you for this excellent feedback - we're taking notes!

reviews.review_description: good game but how do i summon the test subjects

The game is well put together with combinations and elements. For being experimental, there’s already so many combinations to try! My request? To be able to make the bird that sits in the back of the room.

This game is very fun and kinda cool since I'm in chemistry and learning all of the elements. But there are 2 main things that should be fixed. When I recenter, it isn't always correct and also I cant get the traders back after I rejoined the game. This is not a bug but I would love it if I could move the table up and down in smaller increments.
not much learning, just throwing objects aroun
Tablecraft is good but one thing that i dont like is that the traders come after more than 10 minutes from the time  you start playing
Absolute amazing game its just the nuclear elements fly around and pop leaving me with over 100 helium and no way to get rid of it. Also a few new songs would be good

First off I thought the game was just gonna be just a bit boring, but then I realize that the game was not boring. It was absolutely amazing. I would recommend it to everyone in the world. It’s like so much fun. I would rate at five stars definitely best if you wanna learn the periodic table I didn’t even mean to learn it, but I did. ￼

developer_response.body: Haha, thank you! I'm glad you learned new things while having fun! That's awesome.

reviews.review_description:
One of my favorite games right now, needs a sorting menu where you can pull out elements that you have already discovered and a better storage option for items you crafted like a chest that will hold items you put in to it, it also needs a delete gun or a trash bin to put extra items and elemental block you may need, it could use a cleanup feature that auto sorts items into their original place.

it all basically revolves around making a cleaner workspace!

reviews.review_title: I didn't even get to try :(
reviews.review_description: I was so exited about this game, but when I got to the tutorial, it told me to press the grip buttons but as I did, nothing happened and it didn't go to the next step. Please fix this! The game looks so cool to try!!!

Ok I love this game but here's some things you should add and change

First a way to search for the things you need to make instead of spamming the button to cycle through

Second make it to where you can grab the elements you need from the periodic table it's self and you can add a number system to where you still have the number of cubes you had (like if you had 2 titanium's there would be like a little 2 in the corner

And third can you make the customers that drop new elements put them on the table instead of just dropping the elements on the floor?

developer_response.body: Thank you for this excellent feedback - we're taking notes!

reviews.review_description: The first two times I played it was great and I got really far and even made the nuke, but now the customers wont spawn and im stuck with just my  elements I already have. Also what is the 2 machines on the right of the table in the video bc nobody has those im pretty sure, so is it just a dev thing only?

developer_response.body: Oops! Sorry about that. That's a bug. To have the alien customers show up in your lab again, simply visit another timeline (using the Teleporter booth) and then come back to your main timeline. They will start spawning again shortly after! 🙂 Yep, the machines on the right side of the desk in the video were just things I was testing at some point but then never developed further, so I removed them from the public build. Have fun with your nukes! 💥

reviews.review_title: Back to school mood is on!
reviews.review_description: Played this right after going over the periodic table with my son -perfect timing. Crafting with atoms feels fresh and fun.
I love the game it's fun to play but my only request is a storage for the elements and the crafted item or just items in general
I love this game it is so fun, but there is so much helium. It gets in the way of everything

Not to repeat other reviews too much but I'm tired of sorting all my blocks in piles on the floor. It's driving me nuts...

What I also want to see is item requests only come for elements/items you have unlocked/can make. Stop sending people for batteries when I don't have lithium discovered yet. It would also trim out the number of craftable items I have to click through all the time. I can't make these yet so why show me the items?

Finally every element needs some sort of craftable items it can be part of. Many of the elements cause a 404 error when placed on the crafter. I get it's early, hopefully this will come in time. Also... What are we supposed to do with all this helium!!!

Keep it up because I have been playing for hours and hours. Even my wife is into it.

reviews.review_title: Great game that’s lots of fun
reviews.review_description: It’s a great game but can hand tracking be added as I feel it would add a lot of fun to the game being able to pick up the elements and items with my real hand.

This game is super fun but it needs one thing: A storage system! I have almost 20 radioactive atom blocks and can't put them anywhere because they'll decay and I don't remember how to get them and I can't craft anything because my crafter is full of radioactive blocks. So even though it's a great game it's really annoying with nowhere to store my things(especially the hundreds of helium blocks from the radioactive block exploding) but it's a great game and I love it.
Definitely needs some storage space other than that 👍 also the music is good

reviews.review_title: Please do this as soon as possible
reviews.review_description: This game has a lot of potential but I just can't play it it will not allow me to grab anything but the buttons can be pressed if you are wondering it was not my controllers I took out my battery and put it back in that did not work if you see this please do see if you can fix it!

developer_response.body:
Omg, so sorry that happened! It seems to be a very rare bug... you're the 2nd player that's reported this issue so far. We're gonna try to hunt down the bug, but without more info it'll be tough, given that we don't know how to trigger it yet. If you have any more details, please join our Discord and share them with us! https://notsuspicious.biz/discord

In the meantime, if you uninstall the game, then clear your Meta cloud saves, then install it again, you probably won't see that issue anymore. Sorry for the hassle!

reviews.review_description: This game is actually one of my favorites. From the options of what we can make to the interactions with the elements to the mutations you can make. Mind you I’ll blink and it’s been 2hrs, but in those 2hrs the game starts to glitch badly. When the glitch starts it’s like your stutter stepping through the motions. The sorting is another issue. I’ve settle on throwing like colors to certain areas of the room, sorting of some sort would be amazing. But you get the 4 stars cause yesssss. 5 if we get sorting.

Whenever I start up the game, the location which I am in is often different than others and can vary from close to the back table to inside the front table. There needs to be a defined spot for the user to spawn because half the time I cant reach stuff and if I try then I end up leaving the boundaries. Its fun though
No need to explain.
Ever since this game came out ive loved it and it is honestly one of the most amazing games on meta

reviews.review_title: Good but needs a few things
reviews.review_description:
This is a cool game but we could use a few things.
     Firstly and most importantly is SORTING, we need a little sorting thing to store our elements instead of them spilling all over our desk. 
    Secondarily it would be nice to have some sort of creative mode where instead of worrying about finding the elements it is just about making whatever you want to with no limits.
    Thirdly, Multiplayer, Image Of we could chill with a few bros exchanging materials and showing off the weirdest thing we didn't realize we could make like A LITERAL NUKE(Yes, we can make a nuke in this game)

I have been loving playing this game! A little bit buggy for me, as expected during early access. Sometimes I'll load in and it positions me too close to the table and I don't seem to be able to physically move to get out of it, restarting the app sometimes solves this. Sometimes there's no aliens spawning to trade with, however to fix this at the moment I go to another timeline, wait until one appears and then travel back. The other day I had an issue where I couldn't change my creature, the pink lines didn't appear so I was stuck with not being able to try different foods. Too much helium and it gets messy very quick, especially when the probe returns, a bin or quick dispose would be nice or the ability to trade a number of helium for a random element or carbon/oxygen/hydrogen which are needed for most recipes. Would be good to be able to make a balloon to keep for using as a creature, however it always floats off. My game looks different from the video, I do not have whatever the machine is on the right side of the table, I also have lots of big boxes/furniture that takes up space that I can't use to feed anything and can get in the way at times. Have enjoyed sinking lots of hours into this. Music is nice and catchy, but not irritating, cartoon style and colours are appealing. Collecting the creatures and trying different food for them is fun too.
This game look fun
There are so many possibilities and combonations of protons and Neutrons! AND THERES A NUKE
It's a fun game but I can't make pizza it automatically goes to lemon since they have the same formula. Also it needs an organization system to get things already discovered and to put them away.

developer_response.body: Thanks! Yeah, the storage system is a great (and highly requested!) feature idea. As for the pizza, try giving it another try when you get a chance. No two craftables share the exact same recipe. For the Pizza, you need H + C + O + Mn + Fe. For the Lemon, H + C + O + Mg + Fe. Manganese for the Pizza, Magnesium for the Lemon. Similar names, but different Elements! 🙂 Have fun!

reviews.review_description: It’s actually a really fun chemistry game that makes learning the periodic table fun so I hope it gets funding so they can add more stuff to it

I’m new to vr and to gaming in general and I’m having a blast with this simple game. The music is catchy, the graphics are adorable. I love the aliens asking for different things for you to make. I also love all the learning opportunities this game has for different elements and compositions. 

The only reason for knocking off a star is I wish I could use the controller to turn around instead of physically having to turn around. I’m disabled and live in a tiny apartment so physically turning around is sometimes difficult for me.

developer_response.body: Noted! :) Thank you for sharing that. We'll try to include joystick snap-turning and other accessibility options in future updates!

reviews.review_description:
This game is a wonderful game. It’s fun to build stuff but we need a way to store stuff because deleting stuff takes way too long. I have way too much helium. 

Another thing this game needs is a tutorial. I don’t get it like what are the best ways of getting new elements because it takes a long time and also to use items I don’t know I have fireworks but don’t know how to light them with the matches that could just be me, but yeah, 

Last thing is when you join back why does it take a long time for the cloud people to come back? Can’t they just come back faster and another thing can we just have instant craft like we go to the item and then we click craft and it will take the stuff that we have and already crafted it so we don’t have to find it in our huge piles that we have 

Other than those things this game is wonderful. I’m able to make TVs. I’m able to mutate stuff like the glass if you mutated it’s now filled with eyes and also there’s a bird ￼￼￼￼

Hello , ive been reeding the reviews to see if they had the same problem to the purple people disapering and they said to go in the time boot but mine is not working
but befor they were gon the game was verry got :)
please help from moo

developer_response.body: Hi! The bug you're referring to where the alien characters would not spawn when you load the game into an existing save has been fixed in the latest update! :) Sorry for the inconvenience! Have fun!

reviews.review_title: Can’t wait for the full release
reviews.review_description: There are obviously parts that are unfinished since it’s a beta but it’s a cool concept and really fun to play around with!

reviews.review_title: A diamond in the gtag garbage pile
reviews.review_description:
Phenomenal game that rewards chemistry knowledge but has no barrier for entry. So fun that it doesn't feel like an educational game, and I loved mutating the random objects I synthesized.

In the future, i would love to have a controller turning option, as navigating while sitting dltwn is pretty difficult.

developer_response.body: Thanks! That's a great idea -- in future updates we'll make sure to add more accessibility options that can be enabled or disabled, including the snap turn feature you suggested!

reviews.review_description: My only complaint is the fact that I can’t turn with my Joystick

developer_response.body: Noted! :) Thanks for letting us know. We'll try to include it in future updates.

reviews.review_description: 1: a way to mute the music or more soundtracks 2: a way to remove the heavy furniture 3: a way to sort your elements 4: a way to merge elements that all I think it needs because the music gets way too repetitive overall for Early Access game it's really good

developer_response.body: Thank you for this excellent feedback - we're taking notes! Fun fact: you can already mute the in-game music by using the buttons on the Stereo craftable that starts in the lab (on a shelf to your left)! Or, if you lost your original Stereo, you can just craft a new one. 🙂 Have fun!

reviews.review_description: Really nice game different from all other learning games even though it's a beta it's great all I wish is if there was a garage disposal and a storage system for the elements if the creator sees this for a storage system if you make it make it a tablet that can either hold all the elements and have a storage of 10 in total or make it where there's 12 slots that can hold 10 of one element it would make thing less messy i also now have over 500 helium and I can't get rid of it all unless I spend hours doing it
It’s awsome but I wish you could use the items you make
I only crafted 1 thing, this game isnt really for me tbh, uninstalling
Great game but ummm I HAVE 129 BLOCKS OF HELIUM PLEASE MAKE A SORTING MECHANIC AND MORE RECIPES PLEASE.￼￼

As an early access game tester, this is a very fun/educational game with how it is right now though could you add locomotion to move around the lab? It would be very helpful for when there is something hard to grab! Thank you for letting me be able to test this and suggest features!

reviews.review_title: I think it’s time for me
reviews.review_description: I am so happy to see this great game and I played this game for 23 hours
Add the ability to pull elements that you have discovered out of the periodic table. And sorting

LOVE the game i learned so many new elements but multiple times my hands like broke i couldn't grab anything please tell how to fix it already tried deleting and reinstalling and restarting my headset but still didn't work please respond with and answer
Overall 5 STARS

developer_response.body: Oh nooo, that sounds like a weird bug! 😭 Can you join our Discord and drop a message there saying you're the player with the hands issue so I can message you directly on there and try to debug & fix the issue? 🙏 Thank you for your patience! www.notsuspicious.biz/discord

reviews.review_title: Love it. Been wanting something like thi
reviews.review_description:
I do have some suggestions though:
1. Add multiplayer 
2. Add locomotion
3 add a way to store unstable components 
4. Add more recipes
4.5. Or add a way to mix any compound, like Na and K, or glucose
5. Add a creative mode, where you can spawn whatever

reviews.review_title: Very fun game for science nerds!!
reviews.review_description: This is a very mentally engaging science-based puzzle game in which you break down objects into their basic elements and then restructure them into other objects. Your goal is to break down enough objects to analyze what everything is made of and reconstruct the periodic table. It also includes some fantastical elements as well as real-world isotopes. It is a very lighthearted and fun feel, and is extremely imaginative.
At first I thought it would be boring but when I played I had the best time I Really recommended this game to people who love the periodic table
idk how to cook like from the hit show braking bad

developer_response.body: Heh, you can't cook meth in Tablecraft, sorry! To craft anything else, just put some Element cubes together on the crafting machine. For example, F + Na will make toothpaste! With the right ingredients, you can craft a nuclear bomb...

reviews.review_description:
Super well-built, and really fun!! Despite it only being a work in progress, if I didn't know otherwise I'd think this was easily a full release game! 

The only issue I have is that some of the mechanics aren't very intuitive. It would be nice if there were some kind of book, note, or tutorial that gave a basic breakdown of what exactly the different devices do. I do like the rule-discovery aspect, but it's hard to tell what I'm supposed to be looking at a lot of the time!

(For example - I know the device to my left can scan mystery elements to reveal them, but it also says "adding 0 neutrons," and I can't figure out how to actually make it add neutrons? Though maybe I'm just being dense)

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind words! Absolutely, a simple tutorial or even just notes in the lab could help a lot with conveying the game mechanics to new players. We used to have something like that but it got broken at some point as we kept expanding the lab. 😅 Thanks for the reminder, we'll make sure to improve the onboarding in a future update!

As for the the scanner machine (internally we call it Blinky 😀), when you place a cube on its tray, if that cube has already been revealed, a green handle will pop out from the right side of Blinky. You can grab that handle and spin it (physically, or using thumbstick) to add or remove Neutrons from the cube! The fail chance goes higher the more Neutrons you add or remove from a given isotope. If you have any more questions, be sure to check out our Discord, we have a lot of helpful members on there who can guide you! 💫

reviews.review_description: The game is great. It has a cool concept, fun gameplay, and banger music. But, there are a couple of things that would make the overall experience better.(1) A way to easily sort/store the cubes. Within 30 minutes, my table was overflowing with them, and I had no idea where anything was. (2) A way to search for specific  recipes or the ability to pin recipes. It takes way too long to go from acorn to toothpaste, for example. (3) Some different themes and/or music would be a great idea. (4) Multiplayer mode. Enough said. (5) A area to put cubes that are decaying so that helium and other elements aren't bouncing around. Other than that, this is a great (and addictive) game.

I saw this app in the store as I was browsing for something new/different than so much else that is currently available.  I got this app and started it up. With minimal instructions available at the time, I ended up spending about 3 hours the first time, and I am looking forward to continuing the fun.
I admit I am interested in puzzle type games more than shooting type games, which initially led me to give this in production title a second look, and I am definitely glad I did.
Basic play so far: in the world of this game, there is a call to rediscover the periodic table of elements.  You are a scientist working on this objective.  Discovery is done thru finding new elements by breaking down some everyday items you have around your lab, and by creating items by combining elements to create items requested by the people that come to you lab and in payment they leave random elements for you to use.  
I can tell there is a lot more to come for this game, and I am in for all of it.

This game is amazing. As of the overall game rating in my opinion is 5 stars. The game contents of a very cool style and theme, and you learn chemistry along with it. Besides that I think that the toke traveling machine is a bit confusing, I almost got lost traveling dimensions. I suggest of a more simpler way of controlling the machine. (Saved me in chemistry test😅)

I really like this games mechanics although sometimes a bit janky were amazing to play with. I do like how the nuclear and poisonous elements bounce around your workspace. I would however add a way to delete unused elements (like a disintegration ray). I find that my workspace and floor get extremely messy. Overall a great game to try!

But what the hell am I supposed to do? What is the point? There is nothing intuitive about anything available at the beginning of the game. Sure, I can click on a few things...but how exactly am I supposed to "complete the PT"? A simple tutorial is a must here.

developer_response.body: Hey, sorry you had a negative experience! Absolutely, a simple tutorial or even just notes in the lab could help a lot with conveying the game mechanics to new players. We used to have something like that but it got broken at some point as we kept expanding the lab. 😅 Thanks for the reminder, we'll make sure to improve the onboarding in a future update! In the meantime, if you decide to give the current build another try, be sure to check out our Discord, we have a lot of helpful members on there who can guide you! 💫

reviews.review_title: Extremely good for what it is
reviews.review_description: I think it wouldn’t be unreasonable to charge a few dollars for how good it is. The game itself is complete but I’d like a zone to put the lanthanides and actinides in so they’re not bouncing everywhere
The game is fun and enjoyable but I wish the item you can make with the elements could do more things and if you could move around the lab
